properties.displayName: KLZ — Cognitive Services model deployments must be on the approved allowlist
properties.description: Audits Cognitive Services / Azure OpenAI account deployments whose model.name is not in the approved allowlist. Use this to enforce a curated set of models per environment so cost + safety reviews happen before a new model lands in tenant. The deployed resource type is Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/deployments and the relevant field is properties.model.name.

metadata.changelog: 1.0.1 — mode changed from Indexed to All. Cognitive Services /deployments sub-resources lack their own location and were silently skipped under Indexed mode, so Deny never fired.

metadata.description: List of allowed values for properties.model.name on Cognitive Services / Azure OpenAI deployments.
Audit to flag, Deny to block. Promote to Deny after Audit shows a clean baseline.
